prompt: Hi, I was charged twice for my subscription this month. I see two identical transactions of €49 on my bank statement for 3 April. Can you please refund one of them?
I need a proper invoice with our company VAT number on it for last month's payment. Our finance department requires it for tax purposes. Our VAT ID is FR48789456321.
We are thinking about switching from our monthly plan to an annual subscription. Is there a discount available and how would the billing work mid-cycle?
I cancelled our Growth plan account last week but I would like to request a refund for the remaining 18 days of the billing period. We didn't use the service much this month.
Our team has grown and we are now over the 15-seat limit on the Growth plan. I would like to understand the pricing for the Enterprise plan and get a quote for 40 users.
My dashboard has been showing a blank white screen since this morning. I tried refreshing and clearing my cache but it still doesn't load. The page just spins forever.
Our Shopify integration stopped syncing about 6 hours ago. The last successful sync was at 03:00 this morning and since then the data on all our dashboards is stale. We've already tried reconnecting.
I'm getting a 401 Unauthorized error every time I try to call the Seliq API. I copied the API key directly from the settings page so I'm not sure what's going wrong.
The Seliq app on my iPhone keeps crashing as soon as I log in. I'm on iOS 16 and I've already tried reinstalling the app twice today.
I requested a password reset 30 minutes ago but I haven't received any email yet. I checked my spam folder and there's nothing there either.
Our PostgreSQL data source connection is timing out. We can connect from our office network manually but the Seliq connector keeps failing with a 'connection refused' error.
Would it be possible to add a native Slack integration so our team can query metrics directly from Slack using a slash command like /seliq revenue?
Is there an API endpoint we can use to programmatically export our dashboard data as CSV or JSON? We want to pull data into our own data warehouse nightly.
Our IT team requires Single Sign-On via Azure Active Directory before we can roll this out company-wide. Is SSO on the roadmap and when can we expect it?
We use Pipedrive as our CRM and it would be incredibly useful to connect it to our Seliq dashboards. Is there a Pipedrive integration available or planned?
It would be really helpful if multiple team members could leave comments directly on dashboard charts to discuss the data without having to switch to Slack. Any plans for this?
Can you explain exactly what is included in the Enterprise plan? I need to understand what we get in terms of support, data limits, and customisation before presenting this to our board.
We have received a data subject access request from a former employee asking us to delete all their personal data from your platform. How do we submit a GDPR deletion request?
I submitted a support ticket 5 days ago and haven't heard back yet. This is blocking our go-live next week. Is there a way to escalate urgent issues?
Where can I find documentation on how your platform handles data residency? Our legal team needs to confirm that no data leaves the EU before we can sign the contract.
